description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, featuring a metallic blue finish on the back and sides. The rear side displays a prominent triple-lens camera array housed in a raised square module at the top left, accompanied by a small flash. The back also features a centered, reflective Apple logo. The front is dominated by a large, edge-to-edge display with minimal bezels and a small notch at the top for the front-facing camera and sensors. The sides are flat with visible seams, and small circular buttons are present along the edge. The overall design is minimalist and premium, typical of recent Apple iPhone models.
description: A sleek, metallic blue smartphone with a triple-lens rear camera, large edge-to-edge display, and a centered Apple logo on the back.
description_view_0: Back view showing the metallic blue finish, triple-lens camera array in the top left, flash, and centered Apple logo.
description_view_1: Left edge view highlighting the slim profile and the slight protrusion of the camera module.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the large, edge-to-edge screen with a blue abstract wallpaper and a notch at the top.
description_view_3: Right edge view showing the flat side and the camera bump's profile.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, reflective and prominent against the blue surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a blue abstract wallpaper with intersecting light beams and a dark notch at the top; no icons, widgets, or notifications are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: Three camera lenses and a flash are arranged in a triangular pattern within a raised square module at the top left corner of the back.
attribute_button_layout: Small circular buttons are visible on the left edge, likely for volume control and mute; no buttons are visible on the front or right edge.
